title: The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me Yet Showers Me with Adoration Anime Reveals More Cast
content: A stage presentation at AnimeJapan 2026 on Sunday for the television anime for writer Kei Misawa and artist Natsu Mizuno's The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me Yet Showers Me with Adoration ("Kimi o Koi Suru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Kōshaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai Shitekimasu) manga revealed two new cast members on…
author: ANN

title: 20th Anniversary Sgt. Frog Film Unveils June 26 Opening, 2 New Characters
content: The AnimeJapan 2026 stage panel for the Sgt. Frog franchise announced that Shin Gekijōban ☆ Keroro Gunsō Fukkatsu Shite Sokkō Chikyū Metsubō no Kiki de Arimasu! (New Sgt. Frog the Movie: The Earth Is in Mortal Peril as Soon as We Come Back!), the new 20th anniversary anime film project, will open in Japan on June 26.
author: ANN

title: 'Tokyo Revengers: Santen Sensou-hen' Reveals Additional Cast, Second Promo for Fall 2026
content: The Pony Canyon booth at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed four additional cast and a second promotional video for Tokyo Revengers: Santen Sensou-hen ( Tokyo Revengers: Three Deities arc ) television anime on Sunday. The anime is scheduled to premiere in October 2026.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon no Taki-hen' Announces Additional Cast Pair for Fall 2026
content: The Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon no Taki-hen ( Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon Falls Arc ) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the Pony Canyon booth announced an additional cast pair on Sunday. The second season adapting Yura Urushibara 's action fantasy manga will air on Nippon Television beginning in October 2026.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Tune in to the Midnight Heart Anime's 2nd Season Video Unveils New Visual
content: NBC Universal unveiled a new video and visual for the second season of hte television anime of Masakuni Igarashi's Tune In to the Midnight Heart (Mayonaka Heart Tune) manga during a panel for the anime on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: Recommendation from Mr. Iwamoto Anime's 2nd Promo Video Unveils More Cast Members, July debut
content: Hakuhodo's stage presentation at the AnimeJapan 2026 event on Sunday revealed a new visual, additional cast members, the second promotional video, and the July premiere for the television anime of Hiroshi Shiibashi's Iwamoto-senpai no Suisen (Recommendation from Mr. Iwamoto) manga.
author: ANN

title: Rascal Does Not Dream Reveals Rio Futaba Memorial Visual
content: Ahead of the Rascal Does Not Dream anime conclusion with the upcoming Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend movie, the series will release a memorial visual featuring the heroines of the series. First up is a memorial visual of Rio Futaba.
author: Anime Corner

title: Straw Hats Are Off to Elbaph in One Piece Episode 1156 Preview Trailer
content: ONE PIECE revealed the preview for Episode 1156, finally heading the Straw Hats to the long-awaited Elbaph. The anime is coming back after a 3-month break next week. Episode 1156’s title is “The Long-sought Elbaph! The Big Reunion Banquet,” and you can watch the preview trailer below.
author: Anime Corner

title: Sound! Euphonium The Final Movie Reveals Stage Greeting Event, OST CD Covers
content: Sound! Euphonium The Final Movie Part 1 stage greeting event has been revealed along with the CD cover jacket of the movie’s theme song “ToCoda” by TRUE and the original soundtrack “Melody across the Seasons.” Kyoto Animation is animating the movie, set to release on April 24.
author: Anime Corner

title: Tune In to the Midnight Heart Season 2 Reveals Teaser Visual, Trailer
content: The previously announced Tune In to the Midnight Heart Season 2 revealed a teaser visual and trailer at AnimeJapan 2026. The release date of the sequel is yet to be announced. Studio Gekko animated the first season and Masayuki Takahashi is the director.
author: Anime Corner
